title: The Frozen Ground

desc: Richard Williams goes to great lengths to help his daughters become tennis champions.

desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations. S03 E01.

desc: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

desc: A prominent Indian news anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories.

title: Erin Brockovich
desc: As corruption grows in 1950s Los Angeles, three policemen -- one strait-laced, one brutal, and one sleazy -- investigate a series of murders with their own brand of justice.

title: Stepmom
desc: A terminally-ill woman must deal with her ex-husband's new lover, who will be their children's stepmother.
